name: Chocolate Chip Date Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dates, boiling water, and soda. Let cool.
2. Cream the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Add eggs and vanilla.
3. Gradually add flour and soda to the butter mixture.
4. Combine brown sugar, chopped nuts, and chocolate chips in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the date mixture into a greased 9-inch by 13-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle the nut and chocolate topping over the batter.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until golden brown.
May be topped with ice cream or whipped cream and served as a dessert.
